glossary.reserve bank of australia: banco de la reserva de australia
glossary.Reserve Bank of New Zealand: banco de la reserva de nueva zelanda

flaggedForReview.flag: BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pmi industrial" → "industrial PMI" (expected "manufacturing PMI") | DOMAIN: "manufacturing PMI" → "pmi industrial": ACCEPTABLE — "PMI manufacturero" is more standard
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "dólar" → "dollar" (expected "greenback")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "sesgo expansionista" → "expansionary bias" (expected "easing bias")

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "equivalentes del g10" → "G10 equivalents" (expected "G10 counterparts") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "equivalentes del g10" → "G10 equivalents" (expected "G10 counterparts") | DOMAIN: "G10 counterparts" → "equivalentes del g10": WRONG: "homólogos del G10" or "pares del G10" | DOMAIN: "G10 peers" → "equivalentes del g10": WRONG: "homólogos del G10" or "pares del G10"
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pmi de servicios" → "services PMI" (expected "service-sector PMI")

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "nfp" → "NFP" (expected "nonfarm payrolls") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "nfp" → "NFP" (expected "nonfarm payrolls") | DOMAIN: "nonfarm payrolls" → "nfp": WRONG: "nóminas no agrícolas"

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "solicitudes de subsidio de desempleo" → "unemployment benefit claims" (expected "initial jobless claims") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "solicitudes de subsidio de desempleo" → "unemployment benefit claims" (expected "initial jobless claims") | DOMAIN: "initial jobless claims" → "solicitudes de subsidio de desempleo": ACCEPTABLE — "solicitudes iniciales de subsidio por desempleo" is more precise
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pb" → "P/B" (expected "basis points") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pb" → "P/B" (expected "basis points")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "retroceso" → "retracement" (expected "pullback") | DOMAIN: "retracement level" → "retroceso": ACCEPTABLE — "nivel de retroceso" is more precise
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "intertrimestral" → "quarter-on-quarter" (expected "qoq")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "interanual" → "year-on-year" (expected "yoy")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "índice de costes laborales" → "labor cost index" (expected "employment cost index")

BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "perspectiva a corto plazo" → "short-term outlook" (expected "short-term picture") | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "perspectiva a corto plazo" → "short-term outlook" (expected "short-term picture")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "mercado inmobiliario" → "real estate market" (expected "housing market")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "cpm" → "CPM" (expected "MPC") | DOMAIN: "MPC" → "cpm": WRONG: "CPM" is rarely used; standard is "MPC" or "Comité de Política Monetaria"
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "gráfico de cuatro horas" → "four-hour chart" (expected "4-hour chart")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "precio del dinero" → "cost of money" (expected "cash rate") | DOMAIN: "cash rate" → "precio del dinero": ACCEPTABLE — "tipo de interés de referencia" is more standard
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "pedidos industriales" → "industrial orders" (expected "factory orders")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "alcista para el dólar" → "dollar bullish" (expected "USD-bullish")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "barril de brent" → "barrel of Brent" (expected "Brent crude oil") | DOMAIN: "Brent crude oil" → "barril de brent": ACCEPTABLE — "crudo Brent" is more standard
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "escalada" → "escalation" (expected "rally") | DOMAIN: "rally" → "escalada": ACCEPTABLE — "rally" or "repunte" are more commonly used
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "posición neutra" → "neutral position" (expected "neutral stance")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "stocks" → "stocks" (expected "inventories") | DOMAIN: "inventories" → "stocks": ACCEPTABLE — "inventarios" or "existencias" are more standard
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "alcistas" → "bullish" (expected "bulls")
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "ipc de referencia" → "core CPI" (expected "headline CPI rate") | DOMAIN: "headline CPI rate" → "ipc de referencia": WRONG: "IPC general" or "tasa de IPC general"
BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "bajistas" → "bearish" (expected "bears")

Alternatives: estudios de impulso (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "análisis de impulso" → "momentum analysis" (expected "momentum studies") | DOMAIN: "momentum studies" → "análisis de impulso": ACCEPTABLE — "indicadores de momento" is more standard
Alternatives: reunión de dos días (1x) | DOMAIN: "policy meeting" → "reunión de políticas": WRONG: "reunión de política monetaria"
Alternatives: media móvil de 200 períodos (1x) | DOMAIN: "200-period moving average" → "media móvil de 200 días": WRONG: "media móvil de 200 períodos" (periods ≠ days)

Alternatives: ruptura por encima (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "irrupción por encima" → "breakout above" (expected "break above") | DOMAIN: "break above" → "irrupción por encima": ACCEPTABLE — "ruptura al alza" is more standard
Alternatives: presidenta de la fed (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "presidente de la fed" → "Fed Chair" (expected "Fed President")
Alternatives: peticiones de subsidio de desempleo (1x)

Alternatives: no pudiera hacer frente a su pago (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "quiebra" → "bankruptcy" (expected "default") | DOMAIN: "default" → "quiebra": WRONG: "impago" or "incumplimiento de pago"
Alternatives: repuntará (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "repunte" → "bounce" (expected "rebound")
Alternatives: patrón de fallo de oscilación de fondo (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "suelo por fallo de oscilación" → "swing failure low" (expected "failure swing bottom pattern")

Alternatives: programa de expansión monetaria (2x), plan de expansión (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "programa de expansión" → "expansion program" (expected "QE program") | DOMAIN: "QE program" → "programa de expansión": WRONG: "programa de expansión cuantitativa" or "programa de QE"

Alternatives: tipos de los bonos de la fed (1x), interés de los fondos federales (1x), fondos federales (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "tipos de los fondos federales" → "federal funds rate" (expected "Fed funds rate")
Alternatives: precios del petróleo (2x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "precios del crudo" → "crude prices" (expected "oil prices")

Alternatives: fondos de rescate (ela) (2x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "fondos de rescate" → "bailout funds" (expected "Emergency Liquidity Assistance") | DOMAIN: "Emergency Liquidity Assistance" → "fondos de rescate": WRONG: "asistencia de liquidez de emergencia" or "ELA"
Alternatives: subir los tipos de interés (2x)
Alternatives: informe trimestral de inflación (2x)

Alternatives: índice industrial de ism (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "índice industrial ism" → "ISM industrial index" (expected "ism manufacturing index") | DOMAIN: "ism manufacturing index" → "índice industrial ism": ACCEPTABLE — "índice manufacturero ISM" is more standard

Alternatives: zona de sobrecompra (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "territorio de sobreventa" → "oversold territory" (expected "overbought zone") | DOMAIN: "overbought zone" → "territorio de sobreventa": WRONG: "territorio de sobrecompra"
Alternatives: nfp (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "nóminas no agrícolas" → "non-farm payrolls" (expected "nonfarm payroll")
Alternatives: política de tipos (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "tipo oficial" → "official rate" (expected "policy rate")
Alternatives: curvas de rentabilidad (1x) | DOMAIN: "yield curves" → "curvas de beneficios": WRONG: "curvas de rendimiento" or "curvas de tipos"

Alternatives: irrupción por debajo (1x) | BACK-TRANSLATION MISMATCH: "cierre claro por debajo" → "clear close below" (expected "break below") | DOMAIN: "break below" → "cierre claro por debajo": ACCEPTABLE — "ruptura a la baja" is more standard
